grant_title: Wisconsin’s $5M for child psychiatry, community telehealth
project_area: Telehealth expansion for child psychiatry and community access points
demographic_requirements: Targeted to reach people with limited access to technology and reliable internet service, including rural, low-income, and underserved populations
eligibility_summary: Up to five one-year grants of approximately $500,000 for Wisconsin hospitals and health systems to expand child psychiatry telehealth services. Between 25 and 50 providers can apply for one-year grants of up to $100,000 each to partner with community organizations to establish neighborhood telehealth access points at food pantries, homeless shelters, libraries, long-term care facilities, community centers, and schools.
